addressedFeedback.finding: Design accepted the v0.1.17 additive parity slice, issue #63 mapping, goal-review routing reconciliation, and honest verification metadata rules.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Plan scopes six tasks to the accepted slice and keeps adversarial high-risk review explicit.

addressedFeedback.finding: `.verify-results.txt` lacked valid VERIFICATION_COMPLETED_AT and PARITY_SOURCE_DIGEST relative to scripts/v017-parity-evidence.sh.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Added scripts/compute-v017-digest.mjs, node-backed digest in v017_compute_parity_source_digest, scripts/heal-v017-parity-evidence.sh for heal-only metadata refresh; corrupt placeholder removed from .verify-results.txt.

addressedFeedback.finding: Swift CursorCLIAgentEffortResolution still suppressed medium effort for bare gpt-5.5 and gpt-5.5-fast, so it did not fully match the accepted gpt-5.5 family slug mapping.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Changed medium-effort suppression to exclude the gpt-5.5 family, added Swift regression assertions for gpt-5.5-medium and gpt-5.5-medium-fast, and re-ran green v0.1.17 verification.

addressedFeedback.finding: After exec-000009, `.verify-results.txt`, `impl-plans/PROGRESS.json` verifiedEvidence, and `packaging/homebrew/swift-cutover-gates.json` baselineEvidence still lacked authoritative PARITY_SOURCE_DIGEST and VERIFICATION_COMPLETED_AT stamps.
addressedFeedback.resolution: exec-000011 unified digest algorithm in scripts/v017-digest-lib.mjs and aligned heal entrypoints; authoritative stamp command remains bun run v017:heal (blocked in agent runtime shell).

residualRisks: Live Cursor authentication can still affect smoke verification outside no-live deterministic tests.
This plan covers only the accepted v0.1.17 parity slice and must not be treated as full Swift migration completion.
Broader GraphQL remote session transport, SQLite runtime DB session indexing, and production cutover remain outside this plan.
